overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis. The player navigates neon-lit streets past construction zones and holographic advertisements, eventually crossing a busy intersection with other pedestrians amidst towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wet sidewalk past white and red construction barriers, observing neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: white and red striped temporary barriers lining the sidewalk
large illuminated red sign with 'COMBATCAB' text in white letters
rain-slicked multi-lane road reflecting neon lights from buildings
orange metal railing separating sidewalk from street traffic
towering futuristic buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along a wet concrete sidewalk in a cyberpunk city at night. White and red construction barriers line the right side while an orange guard rail separates the walkway from the multi-lane street on the left. The 'COMBATCAB' sign glows prominently on the right as distant skyscrapers pierce the sky with vibrant neon advertisements.

events.description: passing the construction zone into a more open pedestrian area with metal fencing

agents.ego_description: continuing down sidewalk while approaching a group of pedestrians, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall black iron fence running along the right side of the walkway
massive building with illuminated 'RC' logo in green, red, and white neon
lit vending kiosk with glowing interface near the fence
large electronic screen displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the construction zone into a more open pedestrian area bordered by a black metal fence on the right. The iconic 'RC' building becomes visible ahead, its massive neon logo dominating the skyline. Pedestrian density increases as the camera approaches a major intersection, with the orange guard rail now further to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching crosswalk at busy neon intersection

events.description: arriving at crosswalk and waiting at the curb with a group of pedestrians for the signal

agents.ego_description: slowing down and stopping at the crosswalk to wait for the traffic signal alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with bright green hair and black leather jacket waiting to cross

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for 'ARASAKA' corporation with white text
large rectangular planter containing palm trees and vegetation
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on the asphalt
tall modern lamp post illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a wide intersection where the sidewalk opens up significantly. The Arasaka corporate billboard glows on the right while the RC building looms ahead. The camera stops at a yellow-striped crosswalk, joining a group of waiting pedestrians including a distinctive figure with green hair, as vehicles pass by on the wet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: crossing multi-lane street at major intersection

events.description: beginning to cross the street at the yellow crosswalk with the pedestrian group
completing the crossing and panning camera to survey the surrounding intersection and buildings

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow crosswalk with other pedestrians, then stopping to look around at the intersection

entered.detail: streaking red and white light trails from cars driving on the wet street
elevated highway or bridge structure lined with cyan and pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto the yellow crosswalk and walks across the multi-lane street, surrounded by other pedestrians. Vehicle lights streak past on the wet asphalt as the camera moves through the intersection. Upon reaching the other side, the view opens up to reveal a neon-lit overpass bridge ahead, and the camera pans to take in the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape with the RC building now on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined construction zone along a rain-slicked sidewalk into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city intersection. It begins by moving past white and red construction barriers and a glowing COMBATCAB sign, with an orange guard rail separating the walkway from the multi-lane street. As the camera leaves the construction area, the space opens into a wider pedestrian zone bordered by a black metal fence, bringing the massive neon logo of the RC building into clear view. The scene then shifts toward a bustling intersection where the camera pauses at a yellow-striped crosswalk beside a group of pedestrians under the glow of an Arasaka corporate billboard. Finally, the camera steps across the wet asphalt amidst streaking vehicle lights before panning across the sprawling cityscape to reveal a neon-lit overpass bridge.
